data.body:
Web Event Notice 

Sensei! The Emergency Report! event has started!
Please don't forget that the event now updates at 7:00 PM (UTC).

🗓️Event Schedule: 7/23 (Tue) after maintenance – 8/5 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
